summary: Deep-think (3 passes) OGZ architecture: per-client memory, learning loop, create pipeline, data-reading — researched on GitHub + AI platforms, synthesized into the full client journey + how-we-keep-working strategy

client_journey.step: 1. RESEARCH — extract the brand's own truth
client_journey.what_happens: Pull the client's IG/menu/site corpus into clients/<handle>/ (the 3 pilots eatjurisha/albaik/myfitness.sa already have populated profile/ dirs: truth_pack.json 23KB, moments_bank.json 117KB, visual_dna.json 41KB). An extractor proposes candidate facts (sector, products, voice traits, red-lines) — each a PROPOSAL awaiting the founder gate, never auto-truth (Rule #11). Every candidate carries a provenance pointer to its source post/page.
client_journey.how_to_test: Run intake on a held-out 4th brand; assert >= N candidate facts emitted, each with provenance. A fact with no provenance is rejected by the validator.

client_journey.step: 2. DIAGNOSE -> SHOW -> WAIT — the gap report
client_journey.what_happens: Diagnose what the brand's OWN data cannot tell us -> profile/gap_report.json (already exists per pilot). ONLY the gap-questions (not a generic template) surface to Mohamed as Arabic client-questions. Work pauses at his nod (Rule #11 — a hardcoded generic passport was stopped twice before).
client_journey.how_to_test: Assert every gap question traces to a specific EMPTY field in the dossier schema; zero generic/template questions allowed. Show Mohamed 5 gaps, yes/no in 60s.

client_journey.step: 3. MEMORY — the three-tier dossier is written
client_journey.what_happens: Founder-approved facts pin into Tier-1 profile/dossier.json (read-only index over the existing 18 profile files, schema-validated, git-tracked via the existing .versions/ dir). Minds READ it, can NEVER overwrite it (Letta read-only-block pattern: 'memory tools refuse to modify'). His words + past posts go to Tier-3 mem0 OSS (embedded Qdrant+SQLite, user_id=<handle> on every add/search = the anti-bleed isolation). Embeddings on the funded OpenAI key, cents for 3 clients.
client_journey.how_to_test: Hard assert read('albaik') returns zero eatjurisha/myfitness facts. Malformed write -> validator EXITS non-zero (Rule #8). git diff shows every dossier change reviewable/revertible ('bosh').

client_journey.what_happens: scripts/year_map.py composes year_map.json (already ~100KB per pilot) FROM the dossier + 06_saudi_calendar — angles, occasions, cadence. The 5 CD brains + CEO/COO/CCO set the strategic frame. Strategy READS Tier-1 truth; it never re-derives the brand each run ('accumulates, never re-derives').
client_journey.how_to_test: Assert year_map cites only dossier facts (no invented products/claims). Regenerate twice -> strategic frame stable. Spot-check 5 occasions against the real Saudi calendar.

client_journey.what_happens: Per slot generate N=8 varying CD-brain SEAT + angle_card (real diversity, not temperature-paraphrase). Each passes the cultural_gate.json red-line check (Rule #8 refuse). Image prompts come ONLY from the locked 94-chain v3.7 library (money-discipline + 'the prompt is the durable asset').
client_journey.how_to_test: Blind A/B: Best-of-8-reranked chosen over single-shot by Mohamed > 60%. Assert the 8 candidates are semantically distinct (pairwise embedding cosine < threshold), not 8 rewordings.

client_journey.what_happens: The broken 47% averaged absolute scorer is RETIRED. The judge becomes a SynthesizeMe persona-prompt induced from his real pairwise picks (30 already in pairwise_prefs.jsonl), used as LLM-as-judge via predict_pairwise(), cross-checked against the model-free choix Elo. Mohamed's picks are the SOLE gold label; CD brains never vote.
client_journey.how_to_test: Held-out agreement on his pairs must beat 47% AND beat choix-alone. If the two judges disagree, that pair escalates to him (active sampling), not silently resolved.

client_journey.step: 7. LEARN — close the loop, consolidate on the heartbeat
client_journey.what_happens: Every ruling appends to Tier-2 learned.jsonl (client-scoped, timestamped, append-only) -> retrieved into BOTH generate and judge prompts (Rule #6 whole-wire). Weekly consolidation on the make_sure heartbeat dedupes Tier-2 and surfaces CONTRADICTIONS as a founder card — never auto-merges into Tier-1 (HaluMem: auto-update is where bleed is born). The next batch is measurably better; he judges RESULTS (20/batch on the portal), never drafts.
client_journey.how_to_test: A struck-gold caption pattern never reappears in the next batch (regression assert). A contradiction surfaces as a card, not a silent overwrite. Judge-vs-Mohamed agreement trends UP across batches.

strategy.memory_design: THREE TIERS, structurally separated — this is the cure for 'accumulates but never bleeds', and the literature (HaluMem, arXiv 2511.03506) proves contamination is BORN in the extract+update stages, so the fix is structural, not a smarter prompt. TIER-1 BRAND TRUTH = a git-tracked, schema-validated clients/<handle>/profile/dossier.json that INDEXES the 18 profile files that ALREADY exist (truth_pack.json, red_lines.json, fingerprint.json, passport.json, gold.json, visual_dna.json) — do NOT greenfield; the .versions/ dir already gives 33 snapshots = versioning. Read-only to create/judge agents (Letta read_only=true block: docs confirm 'memory tools refuse to modify it'). ONLY the founder-approved extraction pipeline writes here (Rule #6/#11). TIER-2 LEARNED TASTE = append-only, client-scoped, timestamped learned.jsonl; every rating/pairwise pick lands here, NEVER silently merged into Tier-1; weekly consolidation dedupes and surfaces CONTRADICTIONS to the founder for a tap (HaluMem proves auto-resolve is where bleed is born). TIER-3 FUZZY RECALL = mem0 OSS self-hosted on its embedded Qdrant+SQLite default (no new service, no mem0 key), user_id=<handle> on EVERY add/search — that single discipline is the anti-bleed isolation — used only for 'what did we post / what did he say about X', never as brand truth. SKIP for 3 pilots: Cognee/Zep/Graphiti graph modes, full Letta runtime, Neo4j — overkill for dozens of facts each. Verified real repos: github.com/mem0ai/mem0, github.com/letta-ai/letta (docs.letta.com/guides/agents/memory-blocks), github.com/NirDiamant/Agent_Memory_Techniques (Technique 07 entity memory = the build manual).
strategy.learning_design: Do NOT train a reward model. At 3 pilots, no GPU, Anthropic dry, OpenAI funded, and Mohamed's attention as the scarce resource, every train-a-model repo (FSPO/LoRe/VPL) burns a week shipping zero captions — park them as the scale-up north-star. The whole loop is prompt-level + classical-stats and runs on what's ALREADY on disk (30 labeled pairs in pairwise_prefs.jsonl, 90KB mohamed_answers.jsonl). ROOT-CAUSE of the 47%: the scorer AVERAGES 5 CD brains + Mohamed into one judge and clusters everything at ~6.5 (per pairwise.py's own header) — VPL documents this multi-modal-preference collapse as a real failure mode. FIX WITHOUT TRAINING: Mohamed's pairwise picks are the SOLE gold label (he is the moat); CD brains are GENERATORS only, never judge-labels. Loop in order: (1) choix Bradley-Terry (github.com/lucasmaystre/choix, ilsr_pairwise) -> per-caption Mohamed-Elo, model-free, the independent drift alarm + the consumer the pairwise loop was missing; (2) SynthesizeMe (github.com/SALT-NLP/SynthesizeMe, arXiv 2506.05598) -> induce a persona-guided 'Mohamed-judge' prompt from his first ~15 pairs, predict_pairwise() replaces the 47% scorer (+4.4% on Chatbot Arena reported), cents on OpenAI; (3) active sampling (APO) -> only ask him pairs where choix and the LLM-judge disagree, 3-6x fewer taps; (4) memory-as-a-tool wire (Reflexion/MemPrompt) -> every ruling into Tier-2, retrieved into BOTH generate and judge, asserted end-to-end; (5) DSPy MIPROv2 (github.com/stanfordnlp/dspy) once 30-50 gold labels exist -> auto-tune judge+creator prompts to maximize agreement-with-Mohamed, keeping the PROMPT as the durable asset ('the LLM changes, the prompt does not'). Test gate every step: held-out agreement-with-Mohamed must rise and beat 47%.
strategy.data_reading_design: The minds read a STRUCTURED DOSSIER first, RAG second — not raw vectors as truth. (1) PRIMARY READ = Tier-1 dossier.json: summary (the one-paragraph brief every mind reads first), key_facts, red_lines, voice_rules — deterministic, schema-validated, no embedding lookup, so the brand is read the SAME way every run (the consistency the founder asked for). (2) FUZZY READ = mem0 OSS over the brand corpus (past posts, his words, competitor set) with user_id=<handle> scoping — answers 'have we said this before / what did he react to', NEVER used to assert a fact. Embed with OpenAI text-embedding-3-small on the funded key (~$0.00002/1k tokens, negligible for 3 clients). (3) TOOL-USE READ = engagement / Google-Trends / Saudi-calendar fetched as TOOLS at strategy time, written into year_map.json with provenance, never hallucinated. The discipline (Rule #9): a fact reaches a caption only from Tier-1 or a provenance-stamped tool result; a vector hit is a HINT, never a fact. NirDiamant Technique 17 (routing) decides per candidate-fact: brand-fact -> founder-approval queue -> Tier-1; taste-signal -> Tier-2; raw post -> Tier-3 vectors. One engineer lifts those notebooks into the existing Python stack in a day; free, OpenAI-compatible.
strategy.how_we_keep_working: SEQUENCE (strict, each step gated by a numeric test before the next): Step 0 prove the tap lands (answers.jsonl is 0 bytes — fix the half-severed wire FIRST) -> Step 1 choix on the 30 prefs you already have (model-free baseline) -> Step 2 Tier-1 dossier + refuse-validator (no-bleed proven) -> Step 3 SynthesizeMe judge retires the 47% scorer -> Step 4 active sampling -> Step 5 Best-of-N create -> Step 6 close+consolidate the learn loop -> Step 7 DSPy when 30-50 gold labels exist. CADENCE bolted onto the EXISTING heartbeats (no new infra): make_sure.py every cycle asserts the round-trips with hard evidence (numbers never feelings — Rule #8 refuse-don't-warn: a script that can't prove a hop EXITS non-zero); the idle-orchestra picks the next backlog step with reasoning; the weekly consolidation pass dedupes Tier-2 and pushes contradictions as ONE founder card (Rule #10 don't flood). FOUNDER LANE: he judges RESULTS only — 20 complete posts per batch on the portal (Rule #8 money-discipline) — his pairwise picks feed gold/kills, the next batch is better (the full circle). Every win/scar crystallizes into a permanent rule. The loop never idles: a closed thread opens the next-highest-value thread.
build_order: STEP 0 — PROVE THE TAP LANDS (half-day, FIRST). Ground truth on disk: data/answers.jsonl is 0 bytes but data/pairwise_prefs.jsonl already holds 30 real labeled pairs and mohamed_answers.jsonl is 90KB — his picks exist via the seed path, but the LIVE portal-tap -> answers.jsonl -> scripts/pairwise.py consume() -> pairwise_prefs.jsonl round-trip is UNPROVEN (consume() reads ANSWERS = data/answers.jsonl, which is empty, so it prints 'no answers yet'). Rule #6/#7 live-broken. Push 1 pairwise card, tap it, assert a new line appends to pairwise_prefs.jsonl with correct handle+winner. Nothing downstream is trustworthy until this hop is green.

STEP 1 — choix Bradley-Terry ON THE 30 PREFS YOU ALREADY HAVE (half-day). Labels are sitting in pairwise_prefs.jsonl now. ~30 lines: load prefs, run choix.ilsr_pairwise, emit a per-caption Mohamed-Elo. No LLM, no key, no GPU. The independent drift alarm AND the missing consumer the pairwise loop never had. Build before any LLM-judge for a model-free baseline. TEST: hold out 5 pairs -> Elo ranks his winner above loser >= 70%.

STEP 2 — TIER-1 dossier.json INDEX + REFUSE-VALIDATOR (1 day). DO NOT greenfield: clients/<h>/profile/ already has 18 working files + a .versions/ dir with 33 snapshots. Write a schema'd dossier.json that INDEXES + pins canonical fields {entity_id, summary, key_facts[], red_lines[], voice_rules[], preferences{}, open_actions[], schema_version, last_updated}, plus a validator that EXITS non-zero (Rule #8) on malformed writes and a read(handle) with a hard assert albaik never returns eatjurisha/myfitness strings. Lift NirDiamant Technique 07. TEST: malformed write -> non-zero exit; read('albaik') -> zero cross-client tokens. Proves no-bleed before creative runs.

STEP 3 — SynthesizeMe Mohamed-judge, RETIRE the 47% averaged scorer (1 day). The 30 prefs are exactly its input. Induce a persona-guided judge prompt from the first ~15, predict_pairwise() becomes the new cd_judge call. ROOT-CAUSE FIX: stop averaging 5 CD brains + Mohamed into one judge (VPL multi-modal collapse; scorer clusters at ~6.5). Mohamed's picks = SOLE gold label; CD brains = generators only. TEST: held-out agreement beats 47% AND beats choix-alone.

STEP 4 — ACTIVE SAMPLING to protect his attention (half-day). Only push pairs where choix-Elo and the SynthesizeMe judge DISAGREE or are within epsilon (APO, ~50 lines). 3-6x fewer taps per calibration point (ADHD contract). TEST: taps-to-target-agreement vs random pairing.

STEP 5 — CREATE = Best-of-N with the new judge as verifier (1 day). Per slot N=8 varying CD-brain SEAT + angle_card (real diversity from data/angle_cards/, NOT temperature-paraphrase); each passes cultural_gate.json (Rule #8 refuse); image prompts ONLY from the locked 94-chain v3.7 library. Rerank by SynthesizeMe judge, surface top-2. TEST: blind A/B Best-of-8-reranked over single-shot > 60%; assert 8 candidates' pairwise embedding cosine < threshold (distinct, not 8 rewordings).

STEP 6 — CLOSE THE LEARN LOOP + CONSOLIDATION ON THE HEARTBEAT (ongoing). Every ruling -> Tier-2 append-only learned.jsonl (client-scoped, timestamped) -> retrieved into BOTH generate and judge (Rule #6). Weekly consolidation on make_sure heartbeat dedupes Tier-2 and surfaces CONTRADICTIONS as a founder card — never auto-merges into Tier-1 (HaluMem 2511.03506). Wire mem0 OSS (embedded Qdrant+SQLite, user_id=<handle> everywhere) as Tier-3 fuzzy recall of past posts only. TEST: a struck-gold pattern never reappears next batch; a contradiction surfaces as a card.

STEP 7 — DSPy MIPROv2 once 30-50 gold labels exist (optional, 1 day). Auto-tune judge AND creator prompts to maximize agreement-with-Mohamed, keeping the prompt (not a model) as the durable asset. TEST: post-optimization agreement > pre, on a frozen held-out set.
strategy.deepest_risk: The judge can hit 70%+ agreement on Mohamed's HELD-OUT pairs and the captions still feel clean-but-mediocre — because a pairwise judge optimizes 'better than the other option', not 'great + theirs'. Two compounding traps. (1) GENERATOR CEILING: if all N=8 candidates are clean-but-generic (the current failure), Best-of-N just reranks mediocrity — the judge picks the least-bad and his blind-A/B win-rate over single-shot stalls below 60% no matter how good the judge gets. Diversity must come from the SEAT (CD-brain) and angle_card, not temperature; assert it with embedding distance or you ship 8 rewordings. (2) SILENT BLEED THROUGH THE BACK DOOR: the no-bleed assert guards Tier-1 reads, but mem0 Tier-3 and the Tier-2 learned signal are where contamination actually sneaks in (HaluMem's exact finding — the extract+update stages) — a missing user_id=<handle> on a single mem0 add, or one auto-merged contradiction, and albaik's voice quietly drifts toward jirish with no diff to catch it. MITIGATION: run the no-bleed test on the LIVE mem0 path (search returns zero cross-client hits), not just the JSON read; keep Tier-2 append-only with contradictions surfaced as founder cards, never auto-resolved. The thing that looks done (judge agreement up) is not the thing that matters (his blind YES on finished posts) — keep his eyes, not the metric, as the final gate.
